## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Impact

- Did this touch architecture or control logic? (yes/no)
- Did this change API behavior? (yes/no)
- Did this change metrics or experimental results? (yes/no)

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests/checks run (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Scope is focused and minimal
